name: Antioquia (Colombia)

colors.symbolism: the silver of Antioquia's mines and the purity of its people
the fertility of the land and the hope of its people

description: A horizontal bicolour of white over green in equal halves.
history: Adopted as the flag of the Department of Antioquia in 1962, replacing earlier designs. The colours derive from the colonial-era heraldry of the region, where silver (argent) and green appear in the arms of Antioquia.

features.symbolism: white for the silver of Antioquia's mining heritage and the purity of its people; green for the fertility of its mountains and valleys
